Autumn | Soups | Vegetables
SERVES 6-8

Minestrone

A hearty Italian vegetable and pasta soup, packed with seasonal vegetables and white beans.

Ingredients:
3 tablespoons olive oil
1 large onion, diced
3 cloves garlic, minced
2 medium carrots, sliced
2 celery stalks, sliced
200g zucchini, diced
200g green beans, chopped
1 medium potato, diced
1 red bell pepper, diced
400g canned tomatoes, crushed
1 liter vegetable stock
2 cans (400g each) white beans, drained
100g small pasta (ditalini or orzo)
2 bay leaves
1 teaspoon dried oregano
½ teaspoon dried thyme
Salt and pepper to taste
Fresh basil for garnish
Parmesan cheese for serving

Method:
Heat olive oil in large pot over medium heat. Sauté onion and garlic until fragrant, about
3 minutes. Add carrots and celery, cook for 5 minutes. Stir in zucchini, green beans, potato,
and bell pepper. Cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Add crushed tomatoes, stock, white beans, pasta, bay leaves, oregano, and thyme. Bring to boil,
then reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes until vegetables are tender and pasta is cooked.

Season generously with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Remove bay leaves. Serve hot,
garnished with fresh basil and grated Parmesan cheese. This soup tastes even better the next day.

Serves: 6-8
Preparation: 15 minutes
Cooking: 40 minutes
